verified: FixedBudgetFeatureLearner: active + candidate feature banks
Utility tracking per active and candidate feature (EMA)
Promotion: candidate promoted if utility > promotion_margin * worst_active
Replacement: low-utility active features replaced at replacement_interval
Generator meta-learning: random / mutate_parent / imprint strategies
JAX scan-compatible: run_feature_discovery_arrays() with vmap support
Added to canonical out-of-class benchmark (2026-05-21)
out_of_class_polynomial: feature_lifecycle +0.0298 vs best MLP, 30/30 wins, d=+3.213 -- BEATS
frequency_mismatch: feature_lifecycle -0.1626 vs best MLP, 5/30 wins, d=-1.025 -- LOSES
compositional: feature_lifecycle -0.5036 vs best MLP, 0/30 wins, d=-2.979 -- LOSES
feature_lifecycle_out_of_class.interpretation: The generate-test-rank-replace lifecycle discovers useful features on the triple-product polynomial stream (tanh features can approximate polynomial targets). It cannot match sinusoidal or 2-layer tanh oracles, which require multi-layer architectures beyond a single-layer tanh bank. This is an honest limitation: the lifecycle works, but the hypothesis class of the feature bank determines which streams can be solved.

construct_features.note: FixedBudgetFeatureLearner generates tanh(w^T x + b) features. Candidates initialized from random, parent-mutation, or imprint generators.

rank_features.note: Per-feature utility EMA computed from prediction error reduction. Multiple utility modes: output-loss-reduction, contribution-trace, future-utility.

replace_features.note: Replacement at fixed interval: worst-utility active feature replaced by best candidate when promotion_margin condition is met.

resource_budget.note: Fixed n_features active features and candidate_count shadow candidates. Replacement accumulator prevents burst replacement.

beat_mlp_baseline.note: UPGD beats fair MLP on 3/3 out-of-class streams (30 seeds, d > 1.7). FixedBudgetFeatureLearner (full generate-test-rank-replace) beats MLP on 1/3 streams (out_of_class_polynomial: 30/30 wins, d=+3.213). Lifecycle is limited to streams where single-layer tanh features suffice.

feature_finding_on_external_data.note: Resource manager (UPGD component + portfolio) beats MLP on sklearn digits and OpenML MNIST/Fashion-MNIST. Full published-scale OPMNIST is single-seed only.

open_boundaries: FixedBudgetFeatureLearner beats MLP on 1/3 out-of-class streams (polynomial); loses on sinusoidal and 2-layer tanh streams — hypothesis class limitation
Multi-seed full published-scale OPMNIST (800 tasks, 48M updates, 3+ seeds) not yet completed
Feature lifecycle benchmark showing lifecycle generates better features than static MLP over a full training horizon
Integration of feature lifecycle with GVF Horde demons (Step 3 research frontier)
Arbitrary distribution-free universality: proved impossible for bounded-resource causal learner
note: Step 2 claims (2026-05-21): (1) UPGD beats fair MLPs on 3/3 out-of-class streams (30 seeds, d > 1.7); (2) FixedBudgetFeatureLearner (generate-test-rank-replace) beats MLP on out_of_class_polynomial (30/30 wins, d=+3.213) — first benchmark evidence the lifecycle works; (3) Hedge portfolio beats MLP on 5/5 digit benchmarks (10 seeds); (4) Resource manager beats MLP on external sklearn and OpenML datasets (5-10 seeds); (5) Single-seed published-scale OPMNIST. Remaining open: lifecycle loses on sinusoidal/compositional streams (hypothesis class), multi-seed OPMNIST.
